description.zh: 我们的合作最近有不少成果啊，很好，我也愈发信任你了。毕竟，可靠的人总是很有价值的，在这方面我们敢为人先。是时候让你了解我在疗养院进行的一项微妙的工作了。但是首先，我想从你那边拿到一些忠诚的证明—— 一批耳朵。哈哈，要耳朵只是在开玩笑，但是其他的话可不是玩笑。如果你想参与行动，我需要你证明你的忠诚，不一定要用鲜血。
description.en: Our partnership has been quite fruitful lately, it's great - and I want to trust you more. After all, reliable people are valuable. It's time I let you in on a delicate operation I'm running at the resort. However, first, I would like you to prove your loyalty to me, bring me a necklace made from the ears of your enemies. He-he, just kidding about the ears. But I am serious about loyalty - If you want in on this operation, you'll need to prove your loyalty to me, and not necessarily with blood. You know exactly what I mean.
